enhancedcelestials.commands.disabled: Enhanced Celestials' lunar events are disabled for this world!
enhancedcelestials.commands.lunarevent_m: "%s" is not a valid lunar event!
enhancedcelestials.notification.blood_mo: The Moonlight glows red and your eyes go bloodshot...
enhancedcelestials.notification.spectral: Pale Blue lights dance across the stars as otherowrdly voices echo...
enhancedcelestials.notification.harvest_: Crops flourish under the radiant moonlight!
enhancedcelestials.notification.super_bl: The "Super Blood Moon" rises... Distant sounds of the undead can be heard...
The "Super Blood Moon" sets... The undead begin to burn...
enhancedcelestials.notification.super_sp: The "Super Spectral Moon" rises... You feel very lucky!
The "Super Spectral Moon" sets... You don't feel very lucky anymore...
enhancedcelestials.notification.super_ha: The "Super Harvest Moon" rises... Your crops provide an exceptional harvest.
enhancedcelestials.notification.super_mo: The "Super Moon" rises... Slimes begin to spawn nearby.
enhancedcelestials.sleep.fail: You try to shut your eyes... but rest does not come.
